name: Banana Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 package Jello Vanilla or Banana Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 2 1/2 cups cold milk with the Jello.
2. Prepare the instant pudding mix according to package instructions.
3. Pour the Jello mixture into the baked pie shell.
4. Mix in 1/2 cup of the whipped topping until well combined.
5. Chill at least 3 hours.
6. Top with remaining whipped topping.
7. Garnish with banana slices and mint, if desired.
